summary: Verified role-based chat restrictions for agents. All 14 backend tests PASSED, 2 SKIPPED (agent without team - invalid credentials). Frontend UI tests confirmed agent can only see admins and team supervisor in 'New Conversation' list, and agent-to-agent conversations are hidden.

details: Supervisor login and chat widget - PASS
Supervisor sees all users (admins, supervisors, agents) - PASS
Agent login and chat widget - PASS
Agent only sees admins and team supervisor (4 users) - PASS

feature_verification.feature_description: Role-based chat restrictions for agents - agents can only see and chat with Admin(s) and their team's Supervisor
endpoints_modified: GET /api/chat/users - filters users based on role (lines 692-743)
GET /api/chat/conversations - filters out agent-to-agent convos for agents (lines 142-206)
POST /api/chat/conversations - blocks agents from creating chats with other agents (lines 68-104)

agent_conversation_filtering.actual: Agent sees only team chats, admin chats, and supervisor chats

agent_blocked_from_creating_agent_chat.expected: 403 Forbidden when trying to chat with another agent
agent_blocked_from_creating_agent_chat.actual: 403 with message 'Agents can only start conversations with admins or their team's supervisor'

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update password for 'testing123' user to test agent-without-team scenario
critical_code_review_comments: Role-based filtering correctly implemented in GET /api/chat/users endpoint
Conversation filtering correctly hides agent-to-agent chats for agents
POST /api/chat/conversations correctly blocks agents from creating chats with other agents
Supervisors and Admins retain full access as expected
Team supervisor lookup uses team_id to find supervisor_id correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 passed, 2 skipped due to invalid credentials)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based chat restrictions for agents are fully implemented and verified. Agent 'agente' (ITALY team) can only see 4 users (3 admins + supervisor maurizio1). Test file at /app/tests/test_chat_role_restrictions.py covers all scenarios. The 'testing123' agent without team tests were skipped due to invalid credentials - if needed, update the password in the system.
